meaning: n.[动] 树袋熊(澳洲产,树栖无尾动物)
examples: The koala is unique to Australia.
The koala is listed among Australia's endangered animals.
The koala likes to fly a kite.
It is rare to see a koala, although rock wallabies and goannas are more obliging.
Youth hostels do not come much more charming than the Koala Garden House.
